name: pq-companion
description: Desktop companion app for Project Quarm (EverQuest emulated server)
author: jasonsoprovich

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.renderer.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.preload.json
scripts.build:backend:win: cd backend && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/pq-companion-server.exe ./cmd/server
scripts.build:backend:mac: cd backend && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/pq-companion-server ./cmd/server
